title: pronephrium celebicum
intro: Pronephrium celebicum is a species of fern in the family Mariaceae, native to the Philippines. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pronephrium celebicum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption, and is also used in traditional remedies in the form of poultices or compresses.
